languages.text: {n}Глаза сержанта стекленеют. Яруб, побледнев от ужаса, отступает на шаг назад.{/n} "Что вы, Ваше Благородие, это я так... пошутил... плохой из меня шутник нынче, не гневайтесь на дурака". {n}Он так напуган, что вряд ли посмеет заговорить о подобном впредь. Его доверие для вас безвозвратно утеряно... на этот раз.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Яруб в смятении, переводит все в шутку, мол он и не думал ничего воровать.

languages.text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Глаза сержанта стекленеют. Яруб, побледнев от ужаса, отступает на шаг назад.{/n} "Что вы, Ваше Благородие, это я так... пошутил... плохой из меня шутник нынче, не гневайтесь на дурака". {n}Он так напуган, что вряд ли посмеет заговорить о подобном впредь. Его доверие для вас безвозвратно утеряно... на этот раз.{/n}

Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los ojos del sargento se vuelven vidriosos. Jarub, pálido de terror, se aleja de ti.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, e... estaba... de broma... Ya he perdido el toque. No malgaste su ira con un necio como yo». {n}Está tan asustado que dudas que vuelva a atreverse a hablar del tema. Su confianza en ti ha desaparecido para siempre... por esta vez.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los ojos del sargento se vuelven vidriosos. Jarub, pálido de terror, se aleja de ti.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, e... estaba... de broma... Ya he perdido el toque. No malgaste su ira con un necio como yo». {n}Está tan asustado que dudas que vuelva a atreverse a hablar del tema. Su confianza en ti ha desaparecido para siempre... por esta vez.{/n}

languages.text: {n}军士的目光变得呆滞。雅鲁布吓得脸色惨白，向后退去。{/n}“大人，我……我刚刚……开玩笑呢……看来这玩笑没开好。别跟我这蠢货一般见识。”{n}他吓得魂不附体，估计他以后绝不敢再提此事了。这一次，你彻底失去了他对你的信任……{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}军士的目光变得呆滞。雅鲁布吓得脸色惨白，向后退去。{/n}“大人，我……我刚刚……开玩笑呢……看来这玩笑没开好。别跟我这蠢货一般见识。”{n}他吓得魂不附体，估计他以后绝不敢再提此事了。这一次，你彻底失去了他对你的信任……{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ses yeux se voilent et le sergent, blême de terreur, s'éloigne lentement à reculons.{/n} « {mf|Mon seigneur|Ma dame}, je... Je plaisantais, voilà tout... Je me suis rangé il y a belle lurette. Inutile de gaspiller votre juste colère pour un bon à rien comme moi. » {n}Sa terreur est telle que vous doutez qu'il ose à nouveau ne serait-ce qu'aborder le sujet. Sa confiance en vous est irrémédiablement perdue... jusqu'à nouvel ordre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ses yeux se voilent et le sergent, blême de terreur, s'éloigne lentement à reculons.{/n} « {mf|Mon seigneur|Ma dame}, je... Je plaisantais, voilà tout... Je me suis rangé il y a belle lurette. Inutile de gaspiller votre juste colère pour un bon à rien comme moi. » {n}Sa terreur est telle que vous doutez qu'il ose à nouveau ne serait-ce qu'aborder le sujet. Sa confiance en vous est irrémédiablement perdue... jusqu'à nouvel ordre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çavuşun gözleri donuklaşıyor. Jarub, şimdi dehşetten bembeyaz olmuş hâlde senden uzaklaşıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lordum|Leydim}... Ben şaka yapıyordum... O işlerdeki yeteneğimi kaybettim. Benim gibi bir aptala boş yere öfkelenmeyin." {n}O kadar korkmuş ki böyle şeylerden bir daha bahsetmeye cüret edeceğinden şüphe duyuyorsun. Sana olan güveni, telafisi imkânsız bir şekilde kayboldu... Şimdilik.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuşun gözleri donuklaşıyor. Jarub, şimdi dehşetten bembeyaz olmuş hâlde senden uzaklaşıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lordum|Leydim}... Ben şaka yapıyordum... O işlerdeki yeteneğimi kaybettim. Benim gibi bir aptala boş yere öfkelenmeyin." {n}O kadar korkmuş ki böyle şeylerden bir daha bahsetmeye cüret edeceğinden şüphe duyuyorsun. Sana olan güveni, telafisi imkânsız bir şekilde kayboldu... Şimdilik.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Augen des Sergeants weiten sich. Blass vor Entsetzen weicht Jarub vor dir zurück.{/n} "{mf|Mylord|Mylady}, ich ... Das war nur ... ein Scherz ... Ich bin aus der Übung. Vergeudet Eure Wut nicht an einem Narren wie mir." {n}Er ist derart verängstigt, dass er wohl nicht mehr über solche Dinge reden wird. Sein Vertrauen in dich ist zerstört ... dieses Mal.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Augen des Sergeants weiten sich. Blass vor Entsetzen weicht Jarub vor dir zurück.{/n} "{mf|Mylord|Mylady}, ich ... Das war nur ... ein Scherz ... Ich bin aus der Übung. Vergeudet Eure Wut nicht an einem Narren wie mir." {n}Er ist derart verängstigt, dass er wohl nicht mehr über solche Dinge reden wird. Sein Vertrauen in dich ist zerstört ... dieses Mal.{/n}

languages.text: {n}軍曹の目が曇る。恐怖で顔色が青白くなったジャラブは、あなたから遠ざかる。{/n}「お方様、私は…冗談を…言っていただけ。もう冗談の腕は落ちた。お怒りを愚かな私にぶつけないでください。」{n}彼は恐怖で、二度とこのようなことを口にしないだろう。あなたの信頼は、もう取り戻せない…今回は。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's eyes glaze over. Jarub, now pale with terror, backs away from you.{/n} "My {mf|lord|lady}, I... I was just... joking... I've lost the knack for it. Don't waste your anger on a fool like me." {n}He is so frightened that you doubt he will dare to speak of such things again. His trust in you is irretrievably lost... this time.{/n}
